[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Stripe→Ledger routing: GAS implementation + deploy + [LEDGER_ID] pattern documentation
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/113
  
  Details:
  Stripe→Managed Ledger routing pipeline — GAS implementation + deploy + documentation
  
  GAS (stripe_sales_sync.gs):
  - routeStripeCheckoutPurchasesToLedgers() — detects [LEDGER_ID] prefix in Items Purchased column, routes to managed ledger Transactions tab via Shipment Ledger Listing lookup
  - getLedgerConfigs() — reads Shipment Ledger Listing dynamically (Ledger ID, Resolved URL, Status)
  - doGet() web app entry point for real-time Sidekiq trigger from Edgar
  - findFirstEmptyRow(), extractSpreadsheetId() helpers
  - Marks col P "Ledger Routed" to prevent re-processing; skips COMPLETED/SUSPENDED
  
  Deploy:
  - Clasp pushed + deployed as web app
  - URL: https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwauCMu-3Es0s4rB7Cr-fsP2JuEnebyPS8W-ecXG6RUi_zhqpLfG71bramoEwtk54drfg/exec
  - Execute as Me, access Anyone
  
  Documentation:
  - STRIPE_LEDGER_ROUTING.md — all 4 Stripe flows with ASCII diagrams, real-time trigger pattern
  - MANAGED_LEDGER_EXPLORER_PATTERN.md — template-based ledger creation, auto-snapshot
  - SCHEMA.md — Shipment Ledger Listing col A fix (Ledger ID)
  
  Fixes:
  - capoeira transparency → tribomirimbahia.truesight.me
  - capoeira $5 donation option
  - CNAME → tribomirimbahia.truesight.me
